actual_column_names: 2011年、2016年及2021年按種族、婚姻狀況及性別劃分的15歲及以上少數族裔人士百分比分布

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.details: The header spans multiple rows with group labels for marital status and overall categories of ethnicity with sub-labels for gender.

irregularities.label: AGGREGATE_COLUMNS
irregularities.details: These columns contain overall summaries (e.g., Overall, 合計) that aggregate values from other columns representing Male and Female categories.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: Rows 7 to 47, with blanks at Rows 43 and 46
irregularities.details: The column for "Year" has values filled at the start of a block and left blank for subsequent rows until a new block starts.
